---
title: "Page moved"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://data.poverty-action.org">
      <script>window.location.replace("https://data.poverty-action.org");</script>
---

The IPA Data and Tech Handbook has moved to the
[IPA Research and Data Science Hub](https://data.poverty-action.org).

If you are not redirected automatically, visit
<https://data.poverty-action.org>.
